texto: The women’s entire education should be planned in relation to men. To please men, to be useful to them, to win their love and respect, to raise them as children, care for them as adults… these are women’s duties in all ages and these are what they should be taught from childhood.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Jacques Rousseau sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. A afirmação “The women’s entire education should be planned in relation to men. To please men, to be useful to…” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a educacao, men, women, útil em momentos de women.

frase_original: The women’s entire education should be planned in relation to men. To please men, to be useful to them, to win their love and respect, to raise them as children, care for them as adults… these are women’s duties in all ages and these are what they should be taught from childhood.
